text: I am the Evolution Scholar of Dorado. Bring me beast relics and I shall evolve them.
I can evolve Solar Griffin into Shadow Kraken.
I can evolve Shadow Kraken into Thunder Tiger.
I can evolve Astral Serpent into Celestial Specter.
I can evolve Celestial Specter into Arcane Wyvern.
I can evolve Mystic Basilisk into Void Wyvern.

I can evolve Thunder Golem into Mystic Serpent.
I can evolve Ancient Griffin into Mystic Leviathan.
I can evolve Mystic Leviathan into Astral Titan.
I can evolve Arcane Minotaur into Lunar Cyclops.
I can evolve Lunar Cyclops into Mystic Phoenix.

I can evolve Celestial Chimera into Storm Cyclops.
Choose a beast evolution.
